failure.symptom: Runbox7 is a webmail client requiring Runbox backend API. Bug confirmed via source: singlemailviewer.component.ts/html has indentation issues in template (tabs vs spaces) affecting mat-checkbox and button alignment. The print functionality fix is in the .ts file where printablecontent handling is modified.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Runbox 邮件后端。Bug：模板缩进混乱 + 打印内容处理
